actuarial_rationale: Driver age, car age, power, and brand are plausible rating dimensions. The combined interaction set remains interpretable but must overcome a high parsimony burden and sparse-cell stability risk.
description: Enhanced GLM using natural splines for DriverAge, CarAge, and logDensity in all components; adds DriverAgeBand:CarAgeBand to frequency and Power:Brand to raw and capped severity.
hypothesis: The strongest transparent frequency and severity near misses may be complementary: age-car segmentation captures claim propensity while Power:Brand captures repair-cost severity.
